passives.description: 当队伍中有角色生命值低于50%时，希尔菲的治疗效果提升20%。
passives.descriptionEn: When a party member's HP falls below 50%, Sylphy's healing effectiveness increases by 20%.

passives.name: 生命涌泉
passives.description: 队伍中每有一个不同属性的角色，希尔菲的能量回复速度提升5%。
passives.descriptionEn: For each different element in the party, Sylphy's Energy Recharge increases by 5%.

teamComps.name: 希尔菲最佳配队
teamComps.description: 希尔菲为核心的支援队伍，搭配高输出角色和防护角色，确保队伍的持续战斗能力。
teamComps.descriptionEn: A support-focused team with Sylphy, paired with high-DPS and defense characters for sustained combat.

teamComps.name: 星铁快递阵容
teamComps.description: 以星铁快递成员为主的队伍，利用阵营加成和角色间的协同效果。
teamComps.descriptionEn: A team of 星铁快递 members, leveraging faction bonuses and character synergies.
